jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mindtree
jsonLd.description:
Mindtree, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
